team_name: NirnayMarg: AI-Powered Court Judgment to Action Plan Converter
summary: Build an AI system that extracts key information from court judgment PDFs, generates structured action plans, and ensures human-verified data is presented in a dashboard for government use.
key_steps: Extract key details like case number, parties involved, key directives, and timelines
optimization_claims: Improved efficiency in handling complex, inconsistent legal PDFs
Reduced time spent on manually reading court judgments
Increased accuracy and reliability of information for decision making
constraints_addressed: Must handle complex, inconsistent legal PDFs
Outputs must be explainable and verifiable
Focus on decision support, not full automation
